mapper.select: select cu.user_coupon_id as userCouponId, cu.coupon_id as cardId, ct.coupon_name as cardName, ct.coupon_type as cardType, ct.scope_type as scopeType, ct.product_ids_json as productIdsJson, ct.min_amount as minAmount, ct.discount_amount as discountAmount, ct.bonus_principal as bonusPrincipal, ct.bonus_rate as bonusRate, ct.experience_principal as experiencePrincipal, ct.min_experience_units as minExperienceUnits, ct.max_experience_units as maxExperienceUnits, cu.grant_type as grantType, cu.status as userStatus, cu.start_time as startTime, cu.end_time as endTime, cu.create_time as createTime, cu.remark as remark from sys_coupon_user cu left join sys_coupon_template ct on ct.coupon_id = cu.coupon_id where cu.user_id = #{userId} order by cu.create_time desc

select tu.user_trial_id as userTrialId, tu.trial_id as cardId, tt.trial_name as cardName, tt.trial_level as trialLevel, tt.bonus_rate as bonusRate, tt.valid_days as validDays, tt.valid_start_time as templateStartTime, tt.valid_end_time as templateEndTime, tu.original_level as originalLevel, tu.current_level as currentLevel, tu.grant_type as grantType, case when tu.status = '1' and tu.end_time is not null and tu.end_time <= now() then '2' when tu.status = '0' and tt.valid_start_time is not null and tt.valid_start_time > now() then '0' when tu.status = '0' and tt.valid_end_time is not null and tt.valid_end_time <= now() then '2' else tu.status end as userStatus, case when tu.status = '1' and tu.start_time is not null and tu.end_time is not null and tu.end_time > now() then 1 else 0 end as isUsing, case when tu.status = '1' and tu.end_time is not null and tu.end_time > now() then timestampdiff(second, now(), tu.end_time) when tu.status = '1' and tu.end_time is not null and tu.end_time <= now() then 0 else 0 end as remainingSeconds, case when tu.status = '0' and (tt.valid_start_time is null or tt.valid_start_time <= now()) and (tt.valid_end_time is null or tt.valid_end_time > now()) then 1 else 0 end as canStart, tu.start_time as startTime, tu.end_time as endTime, tu.create_time as createTime, tu.remark as remark from sys_level_trial_user tu left join sys_level_trial_template tt on tt.trial_id = tu.trial_id where tu.user_id = #{userId} order by case when tu.status = '1' then 0 else 1 end, tu.create_time desc
select * from sys_level_trial_user where user_trial_id = #{userTrialId} limit 1 for update
select * from sys_level_trial_user where user_id = #{userId} and status = '1' order by end_time desc, user_trial_id desc limit 1 for update

select tu.user_trial_id as userTrialId, tu.user_id as userId, tu.trial_id as trialId, tu.original_level as originalLevel, tu.current_level as currentLevel, tu.status as status, tu.start_time as startTime, tu.end_time as endTime from sys_level_trial_user tu where tu.status = '1' and tu.end_time is not null and tu.end_time <= #{now} order by tu.end_time asc, tu.user_trial_id asc
limit #{limit}

select tu.user_trial_id as userTrialId, tu.user_id as userId, tu.trial_id as trialId, tu.status as status, tt.valid_end_time as templateEndTime from sys_level_trial_user tu left join sys_level_trial_template tt on tt.trial_id = tu.trial_id where tu.status = '0' and tt.valid_end_time is not null and tt.valid_end_time <= #{now} order by tt.valid_end_time asc, tu.user_trial_id asc
limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update sys_level_trial_user set original_level = #{originalLevel}, current_level = #{currentLevel}, status = '1', start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now(), remark = case when #{remark} is null or #{remark} = '' then remark else #{remark} end where user_trial_id = #{userTrialId}

update sys_level_trial_user set status = '2', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now(), remark = case when #{remark} is null or #{remark} = '' then remark else #{remark} end where user_trial_id = #{userTrialId}
